title: psorospermum alternifolium
intro: Psorospermum alternifolium, also known as the Cassia tree or the Cassia fistula, is a tropical tree native to Asia and Australia. It is a deciduous tree with a broad, spreading crown, known for its medicinal properties and health benefits. The plant is traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin diseases due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. In herbal medicine, the leaves and bark of the Cassia tree are prepared as teas, infusions, or decoctions for their medicinal and health benefits.
